chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Crl. Revision Appln.No.S-61 of 2020. _________________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ 01. For orders on office objection “A”. 02. For hearing of main case. 20.01.2022 Mr. Zahid Hussain Chandio, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Sarfraz Ali Abbasi, Advocate for the private respondents. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl.P.G for the State. = * = * = * = * = * = The facts in brief necessary for disposal of the instant criminal revision application are that the applicant filed a direct complaint before learned Special Judge, Anti-Corruption (Provincial) Larkana, who forwarded the same to the Deputy Director, Ant- Corruption Larkana for inquiry and disposal vide his order dated 05.11.2020, which is impugned by the applicant before this Court by way of the instant criminal revision application. It is contended by learned counsel for the applicant that the impugned order being non-speaking is liable to be set aside. Learned Addl.P.G for the State did not support the impugned order. However, learned counsel for the private respondents by supporting the impugned order has sought for dismissal of the instant criminal revision application by contending that the inquiry was not pressed by the applicant before the officials of Anti- Corruption Department. I have considered the above arguments and perused the record. It was a direct complaint; it was to have been disposed of by learned trial Court at its own; its transmission to the Director, Anti-Corruption, for inquiry and disposal, was contrary to the mandate prescribed u/ s.200 Cr.PC; therefore, the impugned order being novel in its nature is set aside with direction to learned trial Court to dispose of the direct complaint itself strictly in accordance with law.

I have considered the above arguments and perused the record. It was a direct complaint; it was to have been disposed of by learned trial Court at its own; its transmission to the Director, Anti-Corruption, for inquiry and disposal, was contrary to the mandate prescribed u/ s.200 Cr.PC; therefore, the impugned order being novel in its nature is set aside with direction to learned trial Court to dispose of the direct complaint itself strictly in accordance with law. The instant criminal revision application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE
